FEED_ITEM_DATA:
title: Entity Framework DB permissions
link: https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/t5/data/entity-framework-db-permissions/m-p/4502558#M75
description: I want to use Entity Framework with a .Net 9 app but have had difficulty finding information on what DB permissions it needs in the app database.

I've found a couple old StackOverflow posts but having created a user with the recommended db_datareader, db_datawriter and db_ddladmin and updated the app connection string to use it and now the app won't start.

What more does it need?
pubDate: Mon, 16 Mar 2026 12:32:28 GMT
guid: https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/t5/data/entity-framework-db-permissions/m-p/4502558#M75

dc:date: 2026-03-16T12:32:28Z

CONTENT:
I want to use Entity Framework with a .Net 9 app but have had difficulty finding information on what DB permissions it needs in the app database.

I've found a couple old StackOverflow posts but having created a user with the recommended db_datareader, db_datawriter and db_ddladmin and updated the app connection string to use it and now the app won't start.

What more does it need?
